creator: mheffner@novacoxmail.com
text:
Ok. Thanks for clueing me in ;)

Upon further inspection I think this is fixed by revs 1.3-1.4 (1.4 even has
your name for credit :) ). Can you try again and see if the problem's solved?

On 17-Jun-2001 Sean Eric Fagan wrote:
| it's a kerberos command.
|
